admissionSteps.title: Check eligibility
admissionSteps.description: Review academic requirements for +2 or equivalent qualifications in relevant streams.
admissionSteps.hint: Eligibility generally requires +2 or equivalent. BIT suits students strong in maths and technology, while B.Tech Ed IT is ideal for those focused on education technology and instructional design.

admissionSteps.title: Submit application
admissionSteps.description: Complete the online form with transcripts, identification, and program preference.

admissionSteps.title: Entrance assessment
admissionSteps.description: Attend the admission test and interview scheduled by the admissions office.

admissionSteps.title: Enrollment
admissionSteps.description: Confirm your seat, complete fee payment, and join orientation week.

careerPaths.title: Software Developer
careerPaths.description: Build web and mobile applications for startups, enterprises, and government projects.

careerPaths.title: IT Support & Systems Admin
careerPaths.description: Manage networks, cloud infrastructure, and enterprise systems for organizations.

careerPaths.title: Ed-Tech Specialist
careerPaths.description: Design digital curricula and learning platforms for schools and training institutes.

careerPaths.title: ICT Teacher / Trainer
careerPaths.description: Lead technology classrooms and professional development programs nationwide.

careerPaths.title: Data & AI Analyst
careerPaths.description: Turn data into insights for business, research, and public-sector innovation.

careerPaths.title: Startup Founder
careerPaths.description: Launch ventures in software, education technology, and digital services.
